text: The contrast between sterile glass and the glimmering, information-laden wall fills me with anticipation and curiosity. In the first space, the silence is almost clinical, hinting at potential and order—an invitation to pause and observe. The second space, vibrant and immersive, feels alive with meaning, urging me to reflect on the intertwining of knowledge and creativity. Being here, I am both watcher and participant, feeling the hum of possibility in the air.
